author: customize
text:
cli: repeatable -m for review and close

`-m`/`--message` on `bl review` and `bl close` is now repeatable, like
`git commit -m … -m …`: first value is the commit title, each later
value a body paragraph. Removes the heredoc friction that pushed
agents toward terse one-line delivery messages. A single multi-line
`-m` still works exactly as before; `None` still falls back to the
task title. New `commit_msg::join_messages` collapses the vec into the
string `format_squash` already understands. Commit-message-shape
integration tests moved to their own file (review.rs was about to
cross the 300-line limit). Docs updated in SKILL, README, CHANGELOG.
